case_title: MIRIAM JUDITH VERDUGO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA MUNICIPAL et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERDUGO, MIRIAM JUDITH ANGULO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY (MUNI) ISOM, YOLANDA LOLITA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-12-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-09-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-18-2014
OBJECTION TO COURT COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY (MUNI) ISOM, YOLANDA LOLITA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-12-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
